reviews.title: Had a bad experience at renaissance hotel
reviews.text: I really had a bad experience in renaissance hotel Johor Bahru. I had a good experience on my 1st stay with the hotel but 2nd stay was very bad.  To cut my story short, I had booked 2 rooms with the hotel. I had message the hotel through agoda requesting a connecting room  and early check in. I came in at 10am amd were told my 2 rooms were not ready and was told by the frontline staff to come back by 12pm to check if my room was ready. So I come back by 12pm to check , one of my rooms were ready and the other room wasn't ready yet. I went up to the hotel so about 2.30pm I called back to ask if my room was ready and was told my room was not ready. I have to keep asking if my room was ready. Im so annoyed. I have to keep on calling to check if the room that I paid for is ready. During check out, I didn't know that my booking wasn't with breakfast and end up I need to pay about RM 480 for 2 days of breakfast. The frontline should inform me during check in. Such an unpleasant service for a 5 star hotel. Services look like a 3 star hotel. Because of my bad experiences, I am not going to stay at Renaissance Johor Bahru.

reviews.title: Awful stay
reviews.text: The first room given to me had an awful smell whereby I wanted out fast. I complained and the second room given was acceptable. A dinein room tray was sitting out by my neighbours room on the floor which I didn't think much of. On second day, when I returned to my room in the afternoon, my room was made up but my neighbours tray was still uncollected, meaning housekeeping didn't bother about cleanliness. The horrifying part is to come....... I used the bidet hose and to my horror, the handle was covered in faeces. I have stayed even in 1 star hotels and never been subjected to an unclean and disgusting experience.

reviews.title: Review of Renaissance JB
reviews.text:
I  booked for a deluxe bay view room.  When I checked in early, they offered me a normal room without informing me that it is a normal room .They did not give me the option to either check into a normal room or wait for a deluxe room which I had booked for. When I realised that I had  checked into a normal room , I called up the reception to request for a change. They obliged  without  offering any apology or any explanation for the earlier slip up. When I tried to make reservation for the  buffet dinner at its cafe, I was informed by the receptionist that I would be on the waiting list. When I  subsequently dined at the cafe , I discovered that there were still vacant seats around. 

I am  also not terribly impressed by the hotel decor , its room or facilities. 

The above comments are from my personal experiences and personal opinions.

reviews.title: Staycation
reviews.text:
Booked a club room with club lounge access. Upon check in , I did ask the check in counter  whether any dress code for lounge access and was told the dress code for lounge access was smart casual and no t shirt , Bermuda and slipper. So we didn’t enjoy the club lounge because we wearing Bermuda , t shirt and slipper. After check in , we went up to the club lounge to have a look. To my surprise, we saw a lady and a man wearing t shirt , Bermuda and a running shoe. We headed to our room
And called the front office to double check and was told that she will
Ask the person in charge of lounge to call back. When the person in charge of the lounge called us and denied that no one is wearing t shirt , Bermuda and slipper or running shoe ,  we replied back that yes there is and  the person in charge say you did went up and see and we say yes. The he twisted his words by saying nvm you can come up again to the lounge , I am the one who in charge the lounge. We find that we were cheated.

reviews.title: We check d into junior suite.  The toilet was poorly cleaned.  Looked as if it was overlooked.
reviews.text: We were very disappointed with the poorly cleaned room upon entering the bathroom.  We had to ask for an immediate change of room and the customer service officer we initially dragging.  I had to strictly insist immediate change after which the hotel customer service agreed. We expected the customer service or room service incharge manager sent someone to the room to see the what was the issue and explain to us but they sent the room service staff to rectify the problem and believe me their room service staff is very poorly trained.  He did a sub standard job without not knowing what hygiene is.  I booked a junior suite as we wanted to have good clean room as we were traveling with a young child. Ended up with poor quality room. Disappointed and will certainly avoid this hotel in future.

reviews.title: Unaccomodating staff, money-squeezing establishment
reviews.text:
Pros: food was alright, female staffs were very friendly and efficient, parking was free

Cons: Male staffs were inefficient and too rigid, connecting rooms for ALL executive suites (meaning loud neighbours and no rest), rooms are old and not well maintained, they charge for EVERYTHING! 

We have always booked executive suites everywhere we go, and never once did the hotel charge us for our daughter to access the executive lounge. You see all these western travellers downing beers by the gallons for free at the lounge and they want to charge my daughter, who only consumes ONE croissant at most! Ridiculous!
reviews.room_type: Club lounge access, Executive Suite, 1 King

reviews.title: Hotel service getting poor now
reviews.text: Had been staying in this hotel at least twice a month last time. Recently had been busy and had not been there for quite awhile. Book a room last week, everything was fine in the beginning. Around 1am we got back to the hotel, had a shower and feeling a little hungry. Called reception to place our order, after 10 mins received a call back from reception stating our meals will need to wait 1 hour. As it's quite late during that time so we understand and agreed to the waiting time. About 15 mins later, we received a call back again stating that our food order is out of stock. All they have available is just fried rice. Wasted 30 mins for nothing, we cancelled and head out again for our meal. Quite disappointed with this kind of service.

reviews.title: Awful service
reviews.text:
My boyfriend and I got engaged a couple of days before our stay at the Renaissance Hotel. As the Renaissance Hotel is part of the Marriott Group, we thought the service would be excellent. When we informed the staff at the check-in counter, we did not even get a simple "congratulations!". The staff did not understand English and were confused over what "engaged" and "proposed" meant. Needless to say, we were not offered a congratulatory bottle of wine or an upgrade. Couples celebrating anniversaries and so on, please take note. Even after feedback was given to the 'Customer Relations officer' (WHAT A JOKE.), nothing was done. Why even bother contacting us to ask how our stay is?

The buffet breakfast was also a let down. The pancakes were stale, noodles were chock-full of MSG and the indian food very bland. There were FLIES on the pancakes. Flies.  

Generally, service around the hotel was very poor, with many of the staff not being able to understand basic English.

reviews.title: Poor quality that does not match value
reviews.text:
Both service standard and property maintenance failed the test

1) Service is not ok - it took me almost 45 mins after getting a room to check in the room. I have booked two rooms, one room is ok but another room got problem.  1st time I was assigned with a room that was not made up, after that I was reallocated with another room, which later on I could not access. It is only come to third round I was allocated with a proper room which apparently lower floor and poor facing. We need to go  to the room three times. It should not be the standard. More so, if the standard was poor, the hotel should have assigned a better room.

2) property is not properly maintained. There is spoiltage on door inside the room, and the lift key is not functional most of the times. I noticed many guest other than us facing the same problem that they could not access to their floor level at once, and only need to try several times. 

3) Air cond sound is very loud. 

Overall the room charges does not match the standard of service ; and it also does not match the property state of maintenance.

It was horrendous. I don't think I will stay there again for the time being.

reviews.title: Unpleasant experience with double charging of room & room locked out
reviews.text: I booked four rooms. One room  was locked out for around two hours. I couldn’t access my things and missed the opportunity to go Swimming. After the room was unlocked it started raining. Hotel put me into another room and offered complimentary room service. Ordered room service at 8pm and food finally delivered at 10.30pm despite multiple chasers. And each chaser kept saying will be there is 30 minutes but it never arrived until 10.30pm which is 2.5 hours later. This is ridiculous and unacceptable. The next day after checkout, I received a SMS saying that there was an additional RM437 charged to my card. I was shocked to see that the hotel could charge without my agreement and authorisation. After clarifying with duty manager, it was a DOUBLE CHARGE to a room that wasn’t even the affected locked out room. HOW CAN THE SYSTEM ALLOW SUCH AN ERROR? this is simply unacceptable - one day has passed and it is still not resolved!!! Simply unacceptable for this hotel.

The lounge is crowded,all tables taken, full of people. Feels like everyone is "snatching"for food. Obviously the hotel was pretty budget to have such limited food for even chicken wings and brie cheese. The ones we stayed before in Singapore park royal usually get served based on what drinks we want instead of self-service. Obviously shorthanded.

High Tea session was like a "buffet" style with like 3 options of dessert. With twinnings tea.

All in all. Doesn't felt like a 5 stars at all. The staff was nice and friendly but service just not up to standard. After all what to expect from a sgd150 stay right? It's value for money enough already.

reviews.title: Terrible check in experience
reviews.text:
I would like to express my unhappiness at check in yesterday. First I was asked to sgn on a wrong check in form. The counter staff issued another form to sign again. A room card was issued to me at 1009. But when I was trying to open the door it could not. And a man opened the door! So obviously the number written on my card is wrong. I went down to counter and they realised the room number was written incorrectly. 1006 room was then reissued for me.

I had not encountered this before and the least happening to an established hotel chain like Marriott. Pls look into yr counter staff training. I do hope this will never happen again.

reviews.title: Good hotel sad service
reviews.text:
Hotel was located far from city centre but theres lots if local shops n restaurants nearby. Also a small mall bout 15mins walk away. Rooms are nice, probably the only real 5 star hotel in JB. I booked 3 rooms to celebrate birthday with my family members and requested for connecting rooms but was not met. Kids n elderly were separated. No complimentary cakes or birthday cards provided even when I've highlighted to the front desk. (Never experience before in all my 5 star hotel stay, as we like to celebrates birthdays in hotels, this is the first which doesn't even wish us happy birthday.) Also strange when the hotel front desk cant accommodate our connecting rooms / same floor request when there's a huge tour group that checked in only at night. So when they mention hotel was full, I wonder why there's a huge group of more than 30 person can check in at 8pm? And they ran out of keycard sleeves, just using envelopes. Embarrassing for a new hotel... 
2 of my rooms has poor drainage in room thus everything we bath, it flooded. Very dangerous especially I have elderly n kids. Bathroom door have malfunction. 1 of my rooms have bad tv reception n thus only few locals tv channel avail. Kids pool has loose screws and so dangerous for kids. The sides of the hotels are very dark everything u walk to the shops behind the hotel, u gotta walk thru the dark sides. That's the only way! So it's unsafe to walk alone, especially if you're a female... The hotel has got so much potential, pity bout all the shortcomings and the frontdesk that is so not helpful. If there's another new 5 star hotel up, definitely renaissance will not be able to stand on par with this kinda service standard. All I could say is they're so not ready to open.

Unbelievable way of a staff from a prominent hotel chain To behave that way without even considering My Dad reasoning.  Inconsiderate  and rude staff.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback and indeed it is to our regrets that you had such an experience with us. We understand how taken aback you must have felt, and we do thank you for sharing this for our knowledge to check and make the necessary improvements and corrections.   

We do hope this will not deter you from staying with us again as this is not our intention to deliver such services and shortfalls. Our team is always sincere and passionate in making our guests' stay memorable and absolutely pleasant. Nonetheless, we hope we can welcome you back again and until then, wish you and your family utmost safety.   

Best Regards,   
Renaissance Johor Bahru Hotel

The kitchen should have prepared more of those popular items like nasi lemak and some others.  The best way to satisfied customer is always through nice food and best of its service. reviews.title: New hotel. But bad location and undertrained staff
reviews.text:
There's nothing to pick on the room & hotel: Room is clean, big and modern. As expected of Renaissance brand.

However, location is bad. There's only 1 small shopping centre in the vicinity, while there are old shophouses with coffeeshops and massage parlours around. It's a good 20min drive away from KSL area and CIQ checkpoint. But I guess that's why the hotel room is priced at this level. This is a hotel that is more suitable for business travellers that have deals in the port nearby or have own transport. Not for tourists or familiy vacations.

Staff is severely undertrained. When I checked in, I was alone but the receptionist offered me a room with 2 twin beds. I had to insist and almost beg before I finally got a king size bed (at one point, she suggessted the club level room at MY OWN EXPENSE). And due to an emergency at home in Singapore that night, I was in a hurry to check out. But the receptionist (a different person from the checkin) seems unsure of what she had to do for a guest checkout and was oblivious to the fact that I was in a emergency. She literally took her own sweet time to mess around the counter and was unwilling to consult her colleague on the process. She even tried to charge me again for the room that I have already paid through Agoda. Renaissance, please train your staff properly.

reviews.title: Not the best 5 stars hotel
reviews.text: Check-in experience was very bad. Greeted by a Malay guy, didn’t get his name tho. We arrived around 2plus in the afternoon and was told that room is not ready. That was acceptable as I understand that check in time is always at 3pm. And the unexpected part was, he told me that they need around 2hours to make up the room and asked us to come back at 4plus as some stayers just check out? Worst part is, he said that he will give me a call once the room is ready, but there wasn’t any call! Really bad customer service! 5 stars hotel but the unfortunately the customer service is poor. Otherwise our stay was perfect there but we definitely won’t return here anymore. There’s plenty of 5 stars hotel with excellent service out there

The female receptionist on duty (at about 12.25pm on 23 June 2019) at the Marriott Bonvoy Elite counter immediately served her and even took some time to serve her as she herself was not sure of the directions. reviews.title: Nice hotel, bit remote for holidays
reviews.text: We were upgrade from standard rooms to club rooms, so my opinion is skewed. The club room was okay, no obvious improvements from a standard room. The club lounge was nice, located on the upper floors with  view of Singapore and downtown JB.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text:
Lovely new hotel, beautiful fixtures and features
Staff tend to be too loud and vocal when giving instructions and reprimanding junior staff. Guests don't need to hear this

An incident that we will never forget. We went to the bar for some snacks. We signed on the bill. Half hour later someone called saying I have to settle my bill in CASH, because I booked my rooms through the internet. Why can't I settle my bills when I checked out the next day, like other top hotels did?  And what does my internet booking has anything to do with it?

reviews.title: Relaxing & enjoyable.
reviews.text: We have enjoyed stay in Renaissance Johor Bahru hotel. It is new hotel and having good facilities and service. In a nutshell, we got value of our money.

reviews.title: Decent all round hotel
reviews.text:
The room itself was very nice and spacious, but there was several flaws. One of which was the fact that there wasn't any tv guide or bar guide. That led to me opening a mineral water bottle that I didn't expect to have to pay $28 dollars for! If I had the bar guide and noted the prices, then I wouldn't be caught off guard like that. However, the nice friendly staff decided to waive the charges seeing that there wasn't the bar guide.

The hotel breakfast buffet was quite nice. However, on the 2nd day, it was still an hour and 15 minutes before end of breakfast time, yet a majority of the food was already gone. When asked whether or not they will replenishing it, the staff just said no with no other reasoning given. It was really disappointing, even something as basic as the fruit juice has ran out and they can't even replenish that. Half of the available foods left were cold.
reviews.positives: Room size, large bathroom and friendly staff

reviews.title: Friendly and helpful hotel staff
reviews.text: Good, since this is a new hotel, the room is clean. However, need to improve the food serve at the club floor loudge. Hotel staff are friendly and helpful.
reviews.positives: Nice breakfast, buffet and nice Chinese food

reviews.title: Pretty new hotel. Some areas to further improved

reviews.title: GREAT HOTEL ROOM
reviews.text: This is my first time to stay in Renaussance Johor Bahru Hotel and this hotel is just opening around one month plus with clean and big room and reasonable price too.The car park is very safety since a guide always around that area with polite and good manners. I will introduce my friends and family to stay in this Renaussance Johor Bahru Hotel for their holiday in JB on next time,thanks for their good services.
reviews.positives: GOOD LOCATION,BIG ROOM WITH BIG BATHROOM ,CLEAN & NICE&COMFORTABLE

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text:
Long weekend,so expected,delays but i thought i could get the room by 3pm but i got to wait nearly till 5pm for the room to be ready. Upon check in, i was told i am not eligible for the exec lounge as it was only for ELITE members,i did emailed them and ask a few questions regarding breakfast,complimentary parking and due to reserving their Club Level, Guest Room, 2 Twin Bedded.
This room will have an Executive Lounge,so there is some miscommunication and thankfully its resolved on the spot. Brought kids to the swimming pool but its a major turn off as there is a strong urine smell near pool,really don't know from where. The food was ok ok. Overall,my stay was pleasant but i paid ***,i expect more prompt services,speed up getting room process is a top notch,hygiene related,but the hotel location has a lot of makan places,karaokes,and massage places,walking distance which is good

reviews.title: Belated review!

reviews.title: Stay for good new experience
reviews.text: Everything was excellent except the toilet & sink clogged (room 1411).  Recomended to try Vadei, gluteen free bread & pillow menu. F&B team very warm & cheerfull even working on Hari Raya especially Shima, Fekri. Good job guys.

reviews.title: Short Getaway
reviews.text:
My partner and I had great experience staying at Renaissance in the past & wanted to head back for a retreat. 

However, during the stay, we've noticed that the rooms have aged significantly with worn out fixtures and slow services of staff did not make it better. 

We used to be able to compromise the quality of stay with the location of hotel, but upon this stay; we felt that it's not worthy. 
The location of the hotel is rather a distance from shopping malls or other areas of Johor where most cafes would be at, thus adding more costs to Grab rides. 

We were glad to have a memorable stay once but probably wouldn't rebook again.

reviews.title: Good stay, but the linens need attention
reviews.text:
Overall, I had a decent experience here, but there was one significant issue that held it back from being a great stay.

The Issue: The towels provided in the room had a very noticeable, sour smell. It’s hard to feel clean after a shower when the towels don't smell fresh. It definitely made me question the quality of the laundry service.

The Positives: Aside from the towel situation, the rest of the stay was perfectly fine. The room was comfortable, the location was convenient, and the staff were helpful.

Verdict: A solid choice if you're not picky, but I’d recommend the hotel looks into their linen sanitization. (Or maybe bring your own towel just in case!)

As for me yes I did hear some noise too but luckily I can sleep comfortably. My room was 1111. Anyway, the bed, the pillow all was comfortable. Breakfast also has many options and sedap!
